name: clara-lina-cross-lane-redirect
description: Lina should handle follow-up, then return the caller to Clara when the request shifts into scheduling.

userTurns.label: Lina follow-up scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me a quote follow-up for a customer who went quiet after three days and needs a gentle nudge.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: Actually I need to reschedule the appointment now, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
